podcasts.name: The Ecom Academy
podcasts.title: You can now run your entire Shopify store inside of Clause using Shopify's AI Toolkit 🤯
podcasts.transcript: You can now run your entire Shopify store directly inside of Claude using Shopify's official AI toolkit. [music] This was released by the president of Shopify, Harley Finkelstein, just a week ago, and it's kind of a big deal. This allows you to use the toolkit to connect right into Claude and all of its [music] AI capabilities. And unless you've been living under a rock for the last few months, Claude is a whole AI ecosystem. It's not just a chatbot. [music] It can think for you. It can create things for you, and it can even do tasks for you. So, if you plug those things together, it can run your entire Shopify store. And that's exactly [music] what I've done. So, in this video, I'm going to show you the simplest and easiest way to set [music] up Claude and the Shopify AI toolkit, and I'm going to give you three use cases that you can be using right now to grow your store. Let's go.
